title: Forge project marker (.claude/.forge.json)
description: Idempotency marker written by the bootstrap engine into <project>/.claude/.forge.json. Records the Forge version, the chosen profile, the selected modules, the profiler facts pointer, and per-file checksums so updates are checksum-guarded. See docs/BOOTSTRAP.md §Mark.

forgeVersion.description: The Forge version that generated this harness (matches forge/VERSION).

profile.description: The base profile selected by the composer; must be a key in manifests/profiles.json.

modules.description: The resolved module set (base profile + moduleSelectionRules deltas); each must be a key in manifests/modules.json.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this harness was generated.

facts.description: Relative path (within .claude/) to the profiler output that drove composition.

files.description: Every file Forge generated, with its checksum and whether the user may edit it. Drift between an on-disk checksum and this value marks a file as user-edited and therefore never overwritten on sync.

path.description: Project-relative path of the generated file.

checksum.description: Content checksum, prefixed with its algorithm, e.g. "sha256:…".

userEditable.description: Whether the user is expected to edit this file (true => protect on sync if checksum drifts).

provenance.description: Optional provenance block (ADR-0009, BR-FLEET-001/002): records the library Registry schema the harness was tailored against and a deterministic sourceRev folding the contentHash of every resolved component, so the fleet can detect component-level drift. Absent on a legacy marker (version-level drift only). Additive: legacy markers without this block stay valid.

registrySchema.description: The on-disk schema tag of the library Registry the harness was resolved against (e.g. "forge.registry.v1").

sourceRev.description: Deterministic sha256 fold over the sorted {uid: contentHash} of the resolved components (order-independent). Format: "sha256:<hex>".
